mapper.select: SELECT /*FormSendMapper.getReqNmChgData*/ A.REQUEST_KEY AS CUST_REQ_SEQ , A.REQ_TYPE_CD AS REQ_TYPE , A.USER_ID AS USERID , A.CSTMR_NM AS GR_CSTMR_NAME , A.MOBILE_NO AS GR_MOBILE_NO , A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AS GR_CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CSTMR_TYPE_CD AS CSTMR_TYPE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_INFO AS GR_RES_NO , B.SCAN_ID , B.CSTMR_NM AS CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_TYPE_CD AS AS_CSTMR_TYPE , CASE WHEN B.CSTMR_TYPE_CD = 'FN' THEN B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN ELSE '' END AS CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN , CASE WHEN B.CSTMR_TYPE_CD = 'FN' THEN '' ELSE B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN END AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AS CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN_ORG , B.AUTH_INFO AS RES_NO , B.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , B.REQ_INFO_CHG_YN , B.SOC AS RATE_NAME , B.CSTMR_ZIPCD AS CSTMR_POST , COALESCE(B.CSTMR_ADR, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(B.CSTMR_ADR_DTL, '') AS CSTMR_ADDR , B.CSTMR_EMAIL_ADR AS CSTMR_MAIL , B.REQ_PAY_TYPE_CD AS REQ_PAY_TYPE , B.REQ_BANK_CD AS REQ_BANK , B.REQ_ACNT_NO AS REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , B.REQ_CARD_CO_CD AS REQ_CARD_COMPANY , B.REQ_CARD_NO , B.REQ_CARD_YY , B.REQ_CARD_MM , B.SELF_CERT_TYPE_CD AS SELF_CERT_TYPE , B.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DATE AS SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , B.SELF_ISSU_NO AS SELF_ISSU_NUM , CONCAT(B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO, '-', B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN_NO, '-', B.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO) AS CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , 'ICN3' AS OPER_TYPE , TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY') AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY , TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'MM') AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM , TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD , 'V' AS GR_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG , B.MINOR_AGENT_NM AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , B.MINOR_AGENT_RRN , B.MINOR_AGENT_REL_TYPE_CD AS MINOR_AGENT_RELATION , COALESCE(B.CLAUSE_FATH_YN, 'N') AS CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , COALESCE(B.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_YN, 'N') AS CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , COALESCE(B.CLAUSE_JEHU_YN, 'N') AS CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG , COALESCE(B.CLAUSE_FINANCE_YN, 'N') AS CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG , COALESCE(B.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE_YN, 'N') AS PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , COALESCE(B.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE_YN, 'N') AS OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , COALESCE(B.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE_YN, 'N') AS OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE , COALESCE(B.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE_YN, 'N') AS OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE , 'N' AS CLAUSE_5G_COVERAGE_FLAG , 'N' AS CLAUSE_PARTNER_OFFER_FLAG , C.TRNS_NM AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID FROM MSF_CUST_REQUEST_MST A LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG B ON A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_NAME_TRNS C ON A.REQUEST_KEY = C.TRNS_SEQ WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = #{custReqSeq}

SELECT /*FormSendMapper.getCancelConsultData*/ 'CC' AS REQ_TYPE , A.CUST_NM AS CSTMR_NAME , A.MOBILE_NO , 'V' AS BENEFIT_AGREE_FLAG , TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DTM, 'YYYY') AS REQ_IN_DAY_YYYY , TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DTM, 'MM') AS REQ_IN_DAY_MM , TO_CHAR(A.CRET_DTM, 'DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY_DD , A.CNCL_APY_NO AS CUST_REQ_SEQ FROM NMCP_NFL_CNCL_APY A WHERE A.CNCL_APY_NO = #{custReqSeq}

SELECT /*FormSendMapper.getAppFormPointList*/ A.PAGE_CD AS PAGE_CODE , A.COLUMN_NAME , A.METAROW , A.METALINE , COALESCE(A.CODEDATA_YN, 'N') AS CODEDATA_YN , COALESCE(A.CODEDATA, '') AS CODEDATA , COALESCE(A.DELETECOLUMN_YN, '') AS DELETECOLUMNYN FROM MSF_APP_FORM_INFO A JOIN MSF_APP_FORM_MST B ON A.PAGE_CD = B.PAGE_CD AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN MSF_APP_GROUP_INFO G ON G.PAGE_CD = A.PAGE_CD AND G.GROUP_CD = #{groupCode} ORDER BY A.PAGE_CD, A.APP_KEY
